DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO GRAVEL COMPANY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-25-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,069.00 FILED BY SAN FRANCISCO GRAVEL COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT MACEDONE, DONALD DBA ARTISAN TILE DESIGN & MACEDONE CONSTRUCTION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-25-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO GRAVEL COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MACEDONE, DONALD DBA ARTISAN TILE DESIGN & MACEDONE CONSTRUCTION $4,069.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,184.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
